axiom_schema_candidates.justification: The builtBy relation connects a structure to the person or organization that constructed, assembled, or otherwise brought it into existence, matching the domain hint Structure and range hint Person.

evidence.snippet: Washington Place ( William Washington House ) is one of the first homes built by freed slaves after the Emancipation Proclamation of 1863 in Hampshire County ,
